summary: User decision recorded: keep current Reverso Codex architecture. Continue using codex exec subprocess backend with validate-only ~/.codex/auth.json OAuth gate; do not add direct OpenAI SDK/API adapter or use local Codex OAuth bearer for Platform API calls now.
